author: y4rr
content: FIXED (via #896): gpu_qr_f32_dev / gpu_qr_f64_dev device-resident paths added. Q output stays on device via gpu_extract_cols + gpu_transpose_2d. R output stays on device via gpu_extract_upper_tri (on-device PTX kernel extracting upper triangle from col-major post-geqrf buffer). backend_impl::qr_f32/qr_f64 call the _dev variants. Probes b2_635_qr_f32/f64_outputs_on_device pass: is_cuda() asserted on Q and R, orthonormality of Q checked, reconstruction ||Q@R-A||_F/||A||_F < 1e-4.
